description: DeBERTa-v3-base (184M) with 30 MI-selected linguistic features via attention-based fusion. Trained on HC3Plus+M4+MAGE+RAID (553K samples) with supervised contrastive loss and paraphrase augmentation. V2 Unicode preprocessing.
authors: Mohamed Mady (TUM / OTH Regensburg / Imperial College London)
training_data: HC3Plus, M4, MAGE, RAID (train split + paraphrase attack)
